svg.title: In-Process vs Out-of-Process Hosting in .NET
svg.desc: Side-by-side comparison showing In-Process hosting where the app runs inside IIS worker process, and Out-of-Process hosting where the app runs in a separate Kestrel process with IIS acting as a reverse proxy.
svg.text: In-Process → hostingModel="InProcess" in web.config | Out-of-Process → hostingModel="OutOfProcess"
